About Afghan Tours

A passionate team dedicated to sharing the real Afghanistan with the world

Contact Us
Our Story

Who We Are

Afghan Tours is a licensed Afghan tour operator committed to responsible, safe, and authentic travel experiences in Afghanistan. We believe that travel has the power to transform perspectives — both for visitors and for the communities they encounter.

Our team combines deep local knowledge with international standards of safety and service. We have spent years building trusted networks of guides, drivers, hosts, and partners across all regions of Afghanistan, allowing us to offer itineraries that go far beyond what a standard tour operator could provide.

We operate with full transparency about the realities of travelling in Afghanistan. Our guests are well-informed, well-prepared, and — most importantly — genuinely welcomed by the Afghan people who are proud to share their extraordinary land with the world.

The Team

Meet the People Behind Afghan Tours

JS

James (Amir) Sidiqi

Operations Lead

A US citizen with over 15 years living and working in Kabul, James brings unparalleled on-the-ground expertise and an extraordinary network across Afghanistan's provinces.

MR

Mohammad (Edrees) Rahimi

Local Guide & Operations Expert

Edrees is an experienced guide and logistics expert who has navigated Afghanistan's complex terrain for decades. His knowledge of local customs and languages is invaluable.

RS

Ramin Sediqi

Cultural Liaison & Logistics

Ramin bridges cultural understanding between our international guests and Afghan communities, ensuring every interaction is respectful, meaningful, and memorable.

Our Difference

Why Travel With Afghan Tours

Licensed & Accountable

We operate as a fully licensed Afghan tour company with all required permits and registrations in place.

Deep Local Relationships

Decades of relationship-building means we have access to communities, sites, and experiences no other operator can offer.

Safety-First Approach

Every itinerary is vetted against current security intelligence. Your wellbeing is always our primary consideration.

Small-Group & Custom Tours

We keep groups small to ensure quality, safety, and genuine connection with the places and people you visit.

Ready to Travel With Us?

Get in touch and let's start planning your Afghan adventure.

Contact Us
AfghanTours

Discover the breathtaking landscapes, ancient history, and rich culture of Afghanistan with our expert-guided tours.
